name: Roasted Chestnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Make a small cross cut on the flat side of each chestnut.
3. Place the chestnuts in a casserole dish.
4. Add a couple teaspoons of olive oil and swirl the pan to coat evenly.
5. Pour in 2 tbsp water and cover tightly with foil or parchment paper.
6. Roast at 425°F for 25-30 minutes, until tender.
7. Serve hot.
